payload.input: Now kiss her there. Lower."  Ethan looks at Maya for permission. She nods, leaning back on her elbows, offering herself up. When his mouth closes over her nipple, wet and tentative, Maya’s head falls back, her hair spilling across the pillows. She thinks about the money, about the Marriott points they’ll rack up, about the bus tickets north that this will buy. She thinks about how she chose this, how she walked up the stairs and opened the door and said yes, and the thought makes her wetter than Ethan’s inexperienced mouth, than Julian’s adult eyes recording every goosebump on her skin. "Lower," she echoes Vivian’s instruction, her hand finding Ethan’s hair, guiding him. "Keep going."
